executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Test the new Milestone 3 features:
1. Tremor charts in /finances and /habits.
2. Form validation in /login and /register (React Hook Form + Zod).
3. Task reordering in /tasks (dnd-kit).
4. Navigation to the new Unified User Hub at /settings.
5. Visual feedback (confetti/animations) on task/habit completion.
